page: Amazon Web Services r8gd.12xlarge is a memory-optimized instance powered by AWS Graviton processors. It features 48 dedicated physical cores on the ARMv9 architecture using the Neoverse-V2 model, operating at 2.8 GHz. The system is equipped with 384.0 GB of memory, yielding a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It includes 2850 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 22 Gbps, running on the Nitro hypervisor.

Benchmark data shows top-tier performance in memory-intensive and multi-threaded operations. The instance achieves top-tier results in large-block memory bandwidth read and write tests, as well as the PassMark memory score. Multi-threaded processing is a strong point, with top-tier rankings in Geekbench multi-core, software compilation with Clang, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Database operations and static web serving throughput also rank in the top tier. Conversely, single-core performance, such as stress-ng single-core and Geekbench single-core, falls into the average category.

The r8gd.12xlarge offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that benefit from high memory density and local NVMe storage on ARM64 architecture. The dedicated core allocation and high memory bandwidth make it suitable for memory-intensive applications, large-scale database operations, software compilation, and multi-threaded data processing. It is also applicable for static web serving and medium-scale language model inference.
description: Amazon Web Services r8gd.12xlarge is an ARM64 memory-optimized instance featuring 48 dedicated physical cores powered by AWS Graviton Neoverse-V2 processors running at 2.8 GHz. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, providing a 1:8 vCPU-to-memory ratio, alongside 2850 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and 22 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark results indicate top-tier performance in large-block memory bandwidth, multi-core Geekbench scores, software compilation, and database operations, while single-core performance remains average. This hardware profile delivers qualitative resource density for memory-intensive and storage-reliant workloads. It is suited for database hosting, multi-threaded data processing, software compilation, and static web serving.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8gd.12xlarge is an ARM64 memory-optimized instance with 48 dedicated Graviton cores, 384 GB RAM, and 2850 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier memory bandwidth and database performance.

tagline: An ARM64 memory-optimized platform featuring dedicated cores, high-capacity local NVMe storage, and top-tier memory bandwidth for data-intensive applications.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated ARM64 physical cores utilizing AWS Graviton Neoverse-V2 processors.
384.0 GB of RAM providing a high-density 1:8 vCPU-to-memory ratio.
2850 GB of integrated local NVMe SSD instance storage.
Top-tier benchmark performance in memory bandwidth and database operations.
22 Gbps baseline network bandwidth managed by the Nitro hypervisor.
Suited for database hosting, software compilation, and multi-threaded data processing.
